name: Dorsel (B.A.Z.) Ltd
summary: Dorsel (B.A.Z.) Ltd engages in the real estate business in Israel. It rents office properties, as well as initiates and develops real estate projects. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Yokneam, Israel. Dorsel (B.A.Z.) Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Synel M.L.L Payway Ltd.
